overview: OmniDataX is a premium Data Science and AI Automation services website with a private admin panel for the team to manage case studies. The site features a dark theme with red, white, and grey accents, showcasing data extraction, engineering, and AI automation capabilities.
features: Private admin page gated by Internet Identity login
Team-only case study management (add, edit, delete)
Public Case Studies page fetches from backend storage
Authorization extension with admin role control
Dark admin dashboard with red/white/grey design
Existing 4 case studies seeded as initial data
